goal: 发布 cxs 0.3.2 并更新本地 CLI/skills

summary.title: 发布 0.3.2 并更新本地入口
summary.what: Bumped @act0r/cxs from 0.3.1 to 0.3.2, pushed the release branch, tagged v0.3.2 to trigger the release workflow, and refreshed local cxs/cxsd CLI plus global cxs/cxsd skill entrypoints.
summary.why: The retained-index sync behavior and archive-agnostic skill guidance needed to be available from the actual local commands and the published package surface, not just from an unmerged worktree.
summary.user_goal: 发布 cxs 0.3.2 并更新本地 CLI/skills

decisions.rationale: The change fixes retained history semantics and adds a compatible sync --prune option without removing existing CLI commands.

decisions.chose: Refresh global cxs via pnpm file install and point cxsd at the current release worktree.
decisions.rationale: This prevents the local published-style CLI and development CLI from disagreeing during verification.

decisions.chose: Reinstall the global cxs skill from the release worktree and create the missing cxsd skill symlink to the same package.
decisions.rationale: Both Codex and Claude skill entrypoints should read the same archive-agnostic guidance.

review_notes: Verification: npm run check passed after the version bump.
Verification: npm run build passed after the version bump.
Verification: cxs --version and cxsd --version both report 0.3.2 locally.
Verification: cxs sync --help and cxsd sync --help both show --prune.
Verification: global cxs/cxsd skill paths contain no archive/archived_sessions/归档 wording.

behavioral_changes: The published package version advances to 0.3.2.
migration_notes: Local ~/.local/bin/cxsd now points at /Users/envvar/work/repos/cxs-index-retention for this release checkout.
Local ~/.agents/skills/cxsd is a symlink to the release checkout skill package.
